scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm ci --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web && rm -rf dist && cp -r web/dist dist && test -f dist/index.html || (echo 'Build failed: dist/index.html missing after copy' && exit 1)
